footer.tag: Multi-touch marketing attribution for WooCommerce. Made in Canada.

home.subtitle: Multi-touch attribution, native WooCommerce tracking, privacy-first by default. Install the free WordPress plugin in under 2 minutes.
home.trustLine: Free forever · No credit card · GDPR compliant
home.problemTitle: The last-click lie is costing you sales
home.problemLede: You're spending on ads but you don't know what's working. Your dashboards contradict each other. Attribution is no longer a commodity — it's a competitive edge.

problems.b: GA4 credits everything to last-click. That Facebook ad that started the journey? Invisible.
Weeks to configure GA4, months for ad integrations. And it still works halfway.
Google Ads in one tab, Meta in another, your store elsewhere. You're drowning in dashboards.

home.solutionTitle: See the full customer journey, in one place

features.b: Compare Last-touch, First-touch, Linear, Time-decay, Position-based, and Data-driven (ML). Same conversion, different credit — pick the model that matches your reality.

features.h: Real revenue, not just page views
features.b: COGS, transaction fees, refunds, net profit — not just gross sales. Native decomposition, no extra setup required.
IP truncation, email hashing, no consent banner required in most regions. PIPEDA, GDPR, CCPA ready from day one.

features.h: From install to insights in under 5 minutes
features.b: Install the plugin, verify tracking, set your first goal, see data flow in. No GTM, no code, no consultants.

home.modelsLede: Each model distributes credit across touchpoints differently. Which one you pick changes which campaigns appear to "work".

models.desc: All credit to the last channel before conversion. Simple, but biased toward bottom-of-funnel.
All credit to the first discovering channel. Reveals where your audience begins their journey.
Equal credit across all touchpoints. Most democratic view, but not intent-aware.
More credit to touches closer to conversion. Exponential decay.
40% first, 40% last, 20% middle. Balances discovery and closing.
models.when: When both ends of the journey matter equally.

models.desc: A Markov model trained on your own journeys. Each credit based on real probabilistic lift.

wp.stepsTitle: From install to insight in three steps

steps.b: Search 'Ajnix' in your WordPress admin or upload the .zip. Activate. We auto-detect WooCommerce.
Open any page on your store. Ajnix confirms tracking is live in real-time. No GTM, no code.
Within 30 minutes you have your first attribution dashboard. Within 24h you have meaningful insights.

features.b: Orders, COGS, fees, refunds, net profit — not bolted on through GA4.
6 models including Markov-based data-driven. See which channels really drive sales.
Generate consistent UTMs in one click. Saved presets for each campaign.
Track form submits, button clicks, scroll depth. Visual goal builder, no code.
Per-product cost of goods. Net profit per channel, per product, per campaign.
Add ad spend by hand or by CSV. Get true ROAS without ad platform integrations.
Native support for Contact Form 7, WPForms, Gravity Forms, Fluent Forms.
IP truncation, email hashing, no fingerprinting. No consent banner required in most regions.
Hooks, filters, REST endpoints. Extend, customize, automate everything.

wp.devLede: Hooks, filters and REST endpoints to extend Ajnix to your needs. Standard WordPress patterns.

faq.q: Does it work with HPOS (High-Performance Order Storage)?
faq.a: Yes. Ajnix uses the WooCommerce Orders API, which is fully HPOS-compatible. Works on legacy posts-based stores too.

faq.q: Does it slow down my WooCommerce store?
faq.a: No. The tracker is a single async script (~9 KB gzipped) loaded from a CDN. All processing happens client-side or in async background jobs. Average impact on Lighthouse: 0.

faq.q: Is my data sent to third-party servers?
faq.a: No. Events are stored in your own WordPress database by default. The tracker script is served from cdn.ajnix.com but never sees user data — it just delivers JS.
Uninstall is clean. We expose an option to either keep your historical data or wipe all Ajnix tables on uninstall — your choice.

faq.q: Will it work with my caching plugin?
faq.a: Yes. Tested with WP Rocket, LiteSpeed Cache, W3 Total Cache, FlyingPress, and SG Optimizer. The tracker is loaded outside of cached HTML.

faq.q: Can I exclude admins from tracking?
faq.a: Yes — admins, editors, or any custom role. Configurable in Settings → Privacy. Also excludable by IP.
Contact Form 7, WPForms, Gravity Forms, and Fluent Forms out of the box. Custom integrations via the developer API.

faq.q: What's different between Free and Pro?
faq.a: Free includes last-touch attribution, WooCommerce tracking, custom goals, and unlimited sites. Pro adds the other 5 attribution models, native ads sync (Google, Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok), real-time visitor stream, AI insights, multi-site dashboard, and Slack/email alerts.

faq.q: Can I use it on multiple sites?
faq.a: Yes. The Free plugin is unlimited sites. Paid tiers have site limits (Starter 1, Pro 5, Agency 25).

faq.q: Do I need a consent banner?
faq.a: In most regions, no. We truncate IP addresses, hash emails, and don't use cross-site cookies. Always check with your legal team for your specific jurisdiction.

waitlist.founderStory: I was running e-commerce campaigns and realized GA4 was lying to me about which channels were driving sales. Ajnix was born because the tools on the market were either too basic (WooCommerce Analytics is last-touch only) or too expensive ($500+/mo for enterprise analytics like Northbeam or Hyros). Built in Canada, privacy-first, designed for real operators.

faq.q: Is the WordPress plugin really free forever?
faq.a: Yes. The Ajnix WordPress plugin (last-touch attribution + WooCommerce tracking + custom goals + manual costs) will always be free, on unlimited sites.

faq.q: How does the early-bird discount work?
faq.a: The first 100 people who join the Pro waitlist get 50% off for life — for any paid tier they pick. Lock in $29, $69 or $199/mo and never pay full price as long as your account is active.
Yes — upgrade or downgrade at any time. Pro-rated billing.
